nasb.text: Beth-marcaboth, Hazar-susim, Beth-biri and Shaaraim. These were their cities until the reign of David.

esv.text: Beth-marcaboth, Hazar-susim, Beth-biri, and Shaaraim. These were their cities until David reigned.

cnv.text: 伯．瑪嘉博、哈薩．蘇撒、伯．比利和沙拉音。直到大衛王的時代，這些都是他們的城市，

ccb.text: 伯·玛嘉博、哈萨·苏撒、伯·比利、沙拉音。在大卫做王以前，这些都是西缅人的城邑。
